channel.title: Blogs on MinhBoo's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Blogs on MinhBoo's Blog

item.title: CPU quota: cpu_limit: 2000m is 2 core ?
item.author: haphanbaominh.dev@gmail.com (MinhBoo)
item.description: Understand what CPU limits really mean in Docker and Kubernetes through Linux CPU time, quota/period, and throttling behavior.

item.title: Redis: Standalone, Master-Replicas, Cluster Mode
item.author: haphanbaominh.dev@gmail.com (MinhBoo)
item.description: Overview of Redis deployment strategies: standalone, master-replica with Sentinel, and cluster mode.

item.title: Publish Your App with apt via Launchpad PPA
item.author: haphanbaominh.dev@gmail.com (MinhBoo)
item.description: A step-by-step guide to package your app, upload to Launchpad, and distribute through apt.

item.title: GitOps with ArgoCD: Push Code, Sync and Take a Coffee
item.author: haphanbaominh.dev@gmail.com (MinhBoo)
item.description: How to control your whole Kubernetes life with ArgoCD and ApplicationSet

item.title: Docker Containers: How each container can run isolatedly on the same host
item.author: haphanbaominh.dev@gmail.com (MinhBoo)
item.description: Ever wondered what happens when you run a Docker container? Let’s dive into the Linux magic behind namespaces, cgroups, and overlay filesystems that make it all possible.
